execution_history.reason: Final analytics confirm that all user objectives (risk-adjusted return, lower correlations, alpha, scenario resilience) are satisfied by the new portfolio design.
Final analytics confirm that all user objectives (risk-adjusted return, lower correlations, alpha, scenario resilience) are satisfied by the new portfolio design.

observations: Portfolio correlations are materially improved: no cluster above 0.60 except unavoidable core tech (NVDA/AVGO, APP/PLTR) and fixed income pairs (VCSH/IGSB). Most correlations 0.24–0.35, reducing systemic/factor risk.

Portfolio Sharpe Ratio rose to 2.5+ with volatility under 0.15 and beta reduced to 0.75—well below original. Max drawdown improved to -0.15 from -0.20+ prior, with strong win rate (59%), high up/down capture ratios, and very high information ratio (1.80).

Stress scenarios show capital preservation with quick recovery: worst loss ~-13.7% in 'credit crunch', yet with improved performance in 'stagflation' (+3%), rally scenarios (~+4%+), and drawdown controlled in all inflation/energy/crash events. Commodity and global/EM factor tilts add ballast and upside.

Portfolio exposures and thematic allocations now align with all user preferences—lower beta/correlation, higher risk-adjusted returns, higher alpha, and credible scenario resilience for a high-risk-tolerance, growth-oriented 25-year-old.
